name: Ranch Dressing Mix/Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the saltines through a blender on high speed until powdered.
2. Add the parsley, minced onions, and dill weed to the blender. Blend again until powdered.
3. Dump the contents into a bowl and stir in the onion salt, garlic salt, onion powder, and garlic powder.
4. Transfer the mixture to a container with a tight-fitting lid and store at room temperature for up to 1 year.
5. To use: Combine 1/42 of the mix, 1 tablespoon of mayo, and 1 cup of buttermilk. Yield: 1 pint.
